common.notFoundHint: 404 — this route does not exist or has not been built yet.
common.name: Name
common.errorHint: Configure API keys under Settings or check the backend log.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time account + positions + candidate pool + risk events.
dashboard.equityCurveHint: Backend has no historical curve yet — showing today vs previous close.
dashboard.noPositionsHint: Once the bot starts and entry conditions match, positions will show up here.
dashboard.candidatesEmptyHint: Trigger monitoring refresh or set OPENAI_API_KEY.
dashboard.noRiskEventsHint: All submitted orders passed risk checks.

markets.title: Markets
markets.subtitle: Monitoring overview + universe search + watchlist.
markets.watchlistEmpty: Watchlist is empty — search above and click to add.
markets.noTrackedHint: Add to watchlist, generate candidates, or open positions.
markets.candidatesEmptyHint: Generated automatically once the bot starts after market open.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Positions / orders / trade history.
portfolio.noTradesHint: P5 PnL aggregator reads from this table.

news.title: News & Research
news.subtitle: Tavily news + company profile + price trend + free-form lookup.

intelligence.title: AI Council
intelligence.subtitle: 5 masters + 1 Sentinel · style-driven analysis (P7) · OpenAI-powered · context fuses P0–P5 data.
intelligence.pickPersonaSubtitle: LLM combines all P0–P5 context to deliver a stylized verdict.
intelligence.questionPlaceholder: e.g. Should I add to my position given the recent earnings?
intelligence.councilSubtitle: Ask N personas at once — see consensus / disagreement. Context built once, LLM called N times.
intelligence.historySubtitle: Past runs across all personas + symbols
intelligence.noHistoryHint: Run one in Personas / Council tabs first.
intelligence.notRunYetHint: Pick a persona + symbol on the left and submit.

backtest.title: Backtest
backtest.subtitle: P3 engine · same Strategy ABC for live + backtest.
backtest.runHint: Backend runs synchronously (yfinance download + simulated trades). Big ranges may take tens of seconds.

algorithms.title: Algorithms
algorithms.subtitle: P2 strategy framework · registered types + user library.
algorithms.libraryEmptyHint: Upload your own Python strategy in the Code tab (P9).
algorithms.uploadHint: Edit / upload flow uses OpenAI to parse natural-language descriptions; backend P2 validates parameter schemas via the registry.

risk.title: Risk
risk.subtitle: P4 RiskGuard · 5 policy types · blocks buys, never sells · events persisted.
risk.policyConfigSubtitle: Saved values are picked up at next live runner restart.

fields.maxPositionSizeHint: MaxPositionSizePolicy · existing exposure + new order > this → reject
fields.maxDailyLossHint: MaxDailyLossPolicy · once realized PnL ≤ -value, all buys are rejected

risk.saveSuccess: Saved — new buy orders are now subject to the new rules.
risk.noEventsHint: All submitted orders passed risk checks.

social.title: Social Signals
social.subtitle: P5 social signals · X scoring · news sentiment · multi-source fusion → buy / hold / sell action

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime keys + system status. Sensitive values aren't echoed back after save.
settings.requiredHint: Without all of these, the dashboard won't return real data.
settings.adminTokenHint: Required when saving on a public deployment that has SETTINGS_ADMIN_TOKEN set.
settings.adminTokenPlaceholder: Blank if your deployment has no admin token configured.

labels.openaiHint: Enables AI Council analysis + candidate-pool final selection + Chinese digests.
labels.notificationsHint: Risk events + alerts POST here (Slack / Discord / generic).
labels.settingsAdminTokenHint: Protect this Settings page on shared/public deployments.
labels.fredHint: Free key from https://fredaccount.stlouisfed.org/apikeys — required only if you want the Macro Environment dashboard (CPI / yield curve / HY OAS / VIX / etc.).
labels.brokerBackendHint: Which broker to route through. `alpaca` (default) or `ibkr`. Switching to `ibkr` requires a running IB Gateway.
labels.ibkrHostHint: Host where IB Gateway / TWS is running. Default localhost.
labels.ibkrPortHint: 5055 = paper, 4001 = live. Set in IB Gateway → Configuration → API.
labels.ibkrClientIdHint: Each connection needs a unique integer. Use any 1-32 unless you run multiple bots.
labels.ibkrAccountIdHint: Your IBKR account ID, e.g. DU1234567 (paper) or U1234567 (live). Required only for `ibkr` backend.
labels.pineSeedsDirHint: Local directory where TradingView pine-seeds CSVs are written. Default: `${DATA_DIR}/pine_seeds`.
labels.pineSeedsRepoUrlHint: Public GitHub repo URL (HTTPS or SSH) for pine-seeds. Required only if you want auto-push. Apply for TradingView whitelist at https://github.com/tradingview-pine-seeds.
labels.pineSeedsWatchlistHint: Comma-separated list of symbols to export options/valuation levels for.

quantlab.title: Quant Lab
quantlab.subtitle: QuantLib integration · option pricing · Greeks · bond analytics · VaR (P8 backend).

fields.returnsHint: Need at least 30 daily returns. Example: -0.01,0.005,-0.003,...

quantlab.noResultYet: No result yet — fill the form on the left and click Compute.

code.title: Code Editor
code.subtitle: Write your own Python strategy · sandbox-validated · auto-registers in the strategy registry (P9).
code.slotNameHint: Stable id used by @register_strategy and selectors. Convention: prefix with 'user_'.
code.descriptionHint: Short description of what the strategy does.
code.sourceHint: Must define a class subclassing Strategy and decorate it with @register_strategy("slot_name"). Imports limited to: core.strategy, core.broker, app.models, numpy, pandas, math, statistics, datetime, typing, dataclasses, decimal, enum, re.
code.uploadSuccess: Uploaded — strategy is now in the registry.
code.uploadedEmptyHint: Use the editor on the left to upload your first strategy.

macro.title: Macro Environment
macro.subtitle: FRED-driven macro indicator dashboard with signal levels
macro.emptyHint: Add a free FRED API key on the Settings page (https://fredaccount.stlouisfed.org/apikeys) and refresh.

indicators.cpi_yoy_desc: Headline CPI year-over-year change. Fed target ~2%.
indicators.pce_yoy_desc: Personal Consumption Expenditures — Fed's preferred inflation gauge.
indicators.walcl_desc: Total assets on the Fed's balance sheet ($M).
indicators.rrp_desc: Daily overnight reverse-repo facility usage. Drains liquidity.
indicators.tga_desc: Treasury General Account balance. Spending TGA injects liquidity.
indicators.hy_oas_desc: High-yield option-adjusted spread — credit stress gauge.
indicators.vix_desc: CBOE volatility index — proxy for vol regime.

macro.directionHintWorse: OK if value ≤ ok_max, WARN if value ≤ warn_max, DANGER if value ≤ danger_max — anything above is also DANGER. Use for inflation, HY OAS, recession probability, etc.
macro.directionHintBetter: OK if value ≥ warn_max, WARN if value ≥ ok_max, DANGER below. Use for yield-curve spread, growth, etc.
macro.directionHintInfo: No signal level — the card just shows the value. Used for raw liquidity / FX series.

calendar.title: Economic Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Upcoming US releases — FOMC, CPI, NFP, PCE, GDP — with countdown and impact rating
calendar.empty: No events in the selected window.

journal.title: Investment Journal
journal.subtitle: Daily research notes linked to your trades
journal.emptyHint: Click '+ New Entry' to record your first thought

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete this entry? This cannot be undone.

valuation.title: Valuation Lab
valuation.subtitle: DCF + historical PE-channel sandbox
valuation.dcfSubtitle: Per-share fair value with ±1pt sensitivity bands
valuation.peChannelSubtitle: Historical PE percentile bands × current TTM EPS
valuation.peEmptyHint: Try a US-listed ticker with positive trailing EPS.
valuation.veryCheap: Trading well below historical PE — possible deep value or earnings-quality concern.
valuation.cheap: Below historical median — modestly cheap on the multiple.
valuation.fair: Inside the historical interquartile range — fairly valued.
valuation.expensive: Above the historical median — expensive vs. its own history.
valuation.veryExpensive: Trading near or above the 95th percentile of historical PE — multiple expansion priced in.

options.title: Options Walls & GEX
options.subtitle: Gamma exposure, call/put walls, zero gamma, max pain
options.emptyHint: yfinance returned no contracts; try a liquid ETF/large-cap (SPY, QQQ, NVDA).
options.callWallHint: Strike with most positive call GEX — likely upside resistance.
options.putWallHint: Strike with most negative put GEX — likely downside support.
options.zeroGammaHint: Where dealer gamma flips — vol regime inflection.
options.maxPainHint: Strike that minimizes total ITM intrinsic at the nearest expiry.
options.gexByStrikeSubtitle: Stacked call (+) / put (−) gamma exposure within ±15% of spot
options.byExpirySubtitle: Per-expiry contracts, max pain, and gamma rollup
options.clickRowToFocus: click a row to drill in
options.focusSubtitle: ATM IV, expected ±1σ range, top OI strikes for this single expiry
options.topResistanceHint: Highest call OI strikes above spot — likely upside friction.
options.topSupportHint: Highest put OI strikes below spot — likely downside cushion.
options.fridayScanSubtitle: Composite score (0–100) for whether the next Friday/0DTE will pin between the walls
options.fridayScanNoData: No contracts for the chosen expiry — cannot score.
options.verdictHintBet: Walls are clear, IV is cheap, gamma is high — strong setup for selling premium that pins.
options.verdictHintMixed: Some signals favor pinning, others don't — wait for closer to expiry or pick a directional play.
options.verdictHintSkip: Walls are weak or vol is too high — pinning is unlikely to hold.
options.squeezeSubtitle: Four-factor compression watcher — flags imminent-move risk before it shows up in price
options.squeezeEmpty: No chain data — cannot score squeeze
options.squeezeHintLow: No compression detected — vol and positioning look normal.
options.squeezeHintMed: Some compression — watch for a catalyst.
options.squeezeHintHigh: Heavy compression — vol is cheap, OI is piled up, positioning is one-sided. Move risk is elevated.
options.squeezeNoSignals: No signals tripped — squeeze is not loaded.

squeezeSignal.iv_rank_low: IV rank in the bottom 30% of its 52-week range — option premium is cheap
squeezeSignal.oi_concentration_high: One strike holds > 5% of total chain OI — gamma is concentrated there
squeezeSignal.put_call_bias_bullish: Put/Call OI ratio < 0.5 — positioning is heavily call-skewed
squeezeSignal.short_interest_high: Short interest > 15% of float — squeeze risk on a sharp up-move
